parameters.apprise_url_plus: msg91://${ customer_secrets.{{ params.template_secret }} }@${ customer_secrets.{{ params.authkey_secret }} }/${ customer_secrets.{{ params.targets_secret }} }
parameters.description: Send notifications to your own MSG91 destination through the UnitySVC gateway. POST the unified message envelope {title, body, type, format}; the gateway composes an Apprise msg91:// URL from your stored secrets and delivers via apprise.unitysvc.dev. The free apprise channel uses your own stored credentials; the apprise-plus channel binds extra per-enrollment destinations via parameters. The gateway/gateway-plus channels transform the envelope directly into a MSG91 Flow API JSON body and post it to api.msg91.com (no Apprise).
parameters.gateway_body_template: {"template_id":"${ customer_secrets.MSG91_SMS_TEMPLATE }","short_url":0,"recipients":[{"mobiles":"${ customer_secrets.MSG91_SMS_TARGETS }","body":{* _escape_json((_body.title or "") .. ((_body.title and _body.title ~= "" and _body.body and _body.body ~= "") and ": " or "") .. (_body.body or "")) *}}]}
parameters.gateway_plus_price_description: $0.001 per message — extra per-enrollment MSG91 destinations, direct
parameters.gateway_price_description: Free — direct to MSG91 Flow API (no Apprise)

authkey_secret.description: Name of the customer secret holding this enrollment's MSG91 authkey

targets_secret.description: Name of the customer secret holding this enrollment's MSG91 targets

template_secret.description: Name of the customer secret holding this enrollment's MSG91 template
